psg-244.summary_reason: Employment Hero achieves full coverage of core_hr_operations and partial coverage of both payroll_compliance and talent_learning cores, qualifying for multi_core_full classification.

core_hr_operations.reason: Solution explicitly supports recording employee details (employee master), leave management, time & attendance tracking, and provides employees access to HR information through web and mobile self-service portal.

payroll_compliance.reason: Solution covers payroll processing and payslip generation; statutory reporting, overtime calculations, and benefits administration are not explicitly mentioned in the description.

talent_learning.reason: Solution explicitly mentions performance appraisal capability; recruitment, onboarding, and document management are not clearly described.

psg-282.summary_reason: Frontier e-HR fully covers the core_hr_operations core with all four mandatory capabilities (employee master, leave management, time & attendance, and self-service portal), but only partially covers payroll_compliance and talent_learning cores.
